notes: Full task bodies live in native Claude Code tasks (TaskGet IDs 1-10). This file is the cross-session resume manifest. Descriptions below are summaries; the canonical body is in each native task's description (which contains Goal/Files/Acceptance Criteria/Verify/Steps + json:metadata fence).

tasks.subject: Task 1: Branch + Firestore rules + indexes for pending_imports
tasks.description: Lock down the data-model boundary: server-only pending_imports + importAddress writes; owner can only flip status to applied|discarded. Compound index on (status, receivedAt). See native task #1 for full body.

tasks.subject: Task 2: Cloud Function generateImportAddress (callable, idempotent)
tasks.description: Callable mints u_<13-char base32>@orders.eliochef.com per Pro user, writes to user doc, idempotent. See native task #2.

tasks.subject: Task 3: Postmark inbound webhook (stub-write only)
tasks.description: HTTPS webhook receives Postmark JSON, validates secret + To: address, dedupes on Message-Id, writes pending_imports stub with status:parsing. See native task #3.

tasks.subject: Task 4: Gemini structured-output parser (pure function, fixture-tested)
tasks.description: Pure parseOrderEmail() with injectable GeminiClient. Forward-wrapper stripper for Gmail/Apple/Outlook. Schema enforces normalised items. See native task #4.

tasks.subject: Task 5: Wire parser into webhook + finalise pending_imports + drop raw bodies
tasks.description: handleInbound() calls parser after stub write; finalises status pending_review|parse_failed; drops rawHtmlBody always, rawTextBody on success. See native task #5.

tasks.subject: Task 6: Client — settings row + OrderImportScreen (Pro-gated)
tasks.description: Order import row in settings under Preferences; free→upsell, Pro→OrderImportScreen showing address + Copy/Share. See native task #6.

tasks.subject: Task 7: Client — pending_imports stream + pantry-tab dot badge
tasks.description: PendingImport models + OrderImportService.pendingImportsStream() + dot badge on pantry bottom-nav icon. See native task #7.

tasks.subject: Task 8: Client — review sheet UI
tasks.description: Bottom sheet: editable items, food default-on / household default-off-collapsed, live Will increment/Will add tag via PantryStringMatch.matchKey, dynamic CTA. See native task #8.

tasks.subject: Task 9: Client — apply flow (review → InventoryWriter → status applied)
tasks.description: OrderImportService.applyImport/discardImport/currentPantryMatchKeys + PendingImportsScreen host. Writes via InventoryWriter.instance.addItem. See native task #9.

tasks.subject: Task 10: USER-GATE — end-to-end real-email verification
tasks.description: Manual E2E: forward a real grocery email, observe pending_imports doc, apply via sheet, verify inventory. 5 captured screenshots committed to docs/superpowers/evidence/. See native task #10 for the full banner + acceptance criteria.
